---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or gap. e.g. "There's no way to..."

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Screenshots, links, or references that might help.
